Private Label Clothing Manufacturing in Pakistan

July 1, 2026 | By FABRIOZA

Private label clothing manufacturing is how the world's most successful fashion brands got started. Nike started as a private label importer. Gymshark began with white-labeled fitness wear. The model is simple: you design the brand, we manufacture the product. At FABRIOZA, we specialize in private label clothing manufacturing from Pakistan with MOQ starting at just 50 pieces.

What is Private Label Clothing Manufacturing?

Private label means garments are manufactured with YOUR branding, not the factory's. When your customers receive their order, they see your logo, your labels, your packaging — nothing about FABRIOZA. It's your product, manufactured by us.

This differs from white labeling (buying generic products and putting your label on them) because with private label, every aspect of the garment is customized to your specifications: fabric, fit, color, construction method, and decoration.

Our Complete Private Label Services

1. Custom Woven Labels

Your brand name woven directly into the garment neck. Options include:

  • Damask woven (premium, detailed)
  • Satin woven (soft, shiny finish)
  • Printed fabric labels (cost-effective)
  • Heat-transfer labels (tagless comfort)
  • Leather patches (premium positioning)

2. Hang Tags & Swing Tags

Custom-designed hang tags with your logo, brand story, care instructions, barcode, and pricing. Printed on premium cardstock with options for:

  • Foil stamping (gold, silver, copper)
  • Embossing/debossing
  • Spot UV coating
  • Die-cut shapes
  • Recycled kraft paper (eco option)

3. Branded Packaging

  • Custom poly bags with your logo
  • Branded tissue paper
  • Cardboard inserts/thank you cards
  • Mailer bags for e-commerce shipping
  • Recyclable and biodegradable options

4. Care Labels & Size Tags

Legally compliant care labels in any language with RF wash care symbols. Custom sizing (XS-5XL or your own sizing system).

OEM vs ODM: Which Private Label Model?

FeatureOEMODM
Design SourceYou provide designs/tech packsWe provide templates
Exclusivity100% exclusive to youMay be adapted for others
MOQ50 pieces50 pieces
Best ForBrands with unique designsStartups testing concepts
Development CostHigher (custom patterns)Lower (existing templates)

Industries We Serve with Private Label

  • Fashion Startups: Launch your first branded collection
  • Gym & Fitness Brands: Branded activewear lines
  • Corporate Workwear: Uniforms with company branding
  • Sports Teams: Club kits and fan merchandise
  • E-commerce Brands: Shopify/Amazon private label stores
  • Streetwear Labels: Premium branded apparel

Our Private Label Process

  1. Brand Consultation: We understand your vision, target market, and positioning
  2. Design Development: Create or adapt designs with our team
  3. Label Artwork: Our designer creates your label and packaging mockups
  4. Sample Production: Garment + labels + packaging for your approval
  5. Bulk Manufacturing: Full production with your branding throughout
  6. Delivery: Garments arrive ready for sale under your brand

Launch Your Private Label Brand

50 pieces minimum. Full branding included. Your design, our factory, your brand.
